label: Solo Educator
description: Teach one clear lesson with a confident solo structure that feels practical from the first line.
bestFor: Explainers, frameworks, and sharp educational episodes.
promptHint: Prioritize clarity, step-by-step teaching, and a concrete listener takeaway.
exampleTitle: The 3-Part Podcast Workflow That Actually Ships Episodes
exampleDescription: Teach one clear lesson, break it into usable parts, and leave the listener with a concrete next step.
